title: IPv6 hop limit=0 forwarding + ICMP Time Exceeded
description: loadng decrements to 0 but core IPv6 forwarding and node.rs lack full RFC 8200 handling (no Time Exceeded on expiry, possible loops if not decremented everywhere). Check recent lichen-ipv6 edits.
close_reason: IPv6 forwarding in lichen-ipv6::Ipv6Header::with_decremented_hop_limit + node.rs/loadng updated for RFC 8200 hop limit decrement and ICMP Time Exceeded generation (type 3 code 0); independent test vectors added. All tests, cargo test, clippy pass.
